Contact

Book a Trial Lesson

The best way to begin is to come and play. Reach out and we'll arrange a trial lesson and a look around the studio.

  • Call us+965 0000 0000
  • WhatsApp+965 0000 0000
  • Emailinfo@ariamusicacademy.org
  • LocationBuilding 00, Street 00, Block 0, Kuwait City, Kuwait
  • Opening hoursSa, Su, Mo, Tu, We, Th: 10:00–21:00
    Fr: 16:00–21:00

Tell us a little about the student and what you'd like to learn — we'll reply with availability and the next steps.

WhatsApp · +965 0000 0000

Before you visit

How do I book a trial lesson?

Send an enquiry below, call, or message us on WhatsApp. We'll suggest a time, confirm the details, and welcome you to the studio.

Where are you located?

Aria Music Academy is in Kuwait. You'll find our exact address and map on this page — and we're happy to share directions when you book.

What are your opening hours?

Our current opening hours are listed on this page. If you need a time outside them, just ask and we'll do our best.

Piano & vocal lessons in Kuwait.
